case_title: MAGDA KAROLINA HOLDA VS. WILLIAM E. BERGERSON

docket_entries.description: (SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOLDA, MAGDA KAROLINA
ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SC-108)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MAGDA HOLDA IS PRESENT. WILLIAM BERGERSON IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLDA, MAGDA KAROLINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BERGERSON, WILLIAM E. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2017 - JUDGMENT.
